text.title: Spec-Driven Debugging Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Spec-Driven Debugging end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: write-failing-spec
step.action: Author failing test asserting expected behaviour; commit alone.

step.name: minimize-repro
step.action: Apply delta-debugging; reduce to <=20 lines or single assertion.

step.name: bisect-if-regression
step.action: git bisect with the failing spec as oracle.
step.decision-gate: Reject guessing the cause without bisect when applicable.

step.name: fix-and-flip
step.action: Implement minimum code change; spec MUST turn green; refactor while green.
step.decision-gate: Reject fix landed before failing spec.

step.name: keep-regression-test
step.action: Ensure spec stays in suite; link to incident/issue.
step.decision-gate: Reject deletion of the regression test.
